title: Vivi Pushes Toward Yuba
description: On pages 8–11, this part focuses on vivi pushes toward yuba, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Vivi Pushes Toward Yuba. The Straw Hats struggle across Alabasta’s harsh desert as Vivi’s urgency and the scale of the rebellion become clearer. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: There were 3-days' worth of supplies in there!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And you just had to lose it to some damn birds out of all things!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: How the hell do you expect us to survive without any food or water in the middle of this desert!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Well it's too late to complain now! I've already been tricked!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oh, so you're dumber than a bird now, is that it!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Let's rest here for a bit. The heat's making you all lose your temper so just cool your heads in the shades here.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: ...We'll be able to reach Yuba by night, right Vivi?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Since Yuba's an oasis town, all we have to do is hold out until then. Losing those supplies won't be the death of us.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: So let's just forget about what happened, lest we tire ourselves out even more.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: We'll head out again after 10 minutes of rest.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: No, Luffy! Don't chase after them! You're only going to get yourself lost!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Nami's right! And you'll only tire your- self out!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Let's set aside the fact that there's a camel running beside him for now while we take care of this...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Just what kind of star was he born under to be fated to so much trouble...

summary: This part develops vivi pushes toward yuba and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
